synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-0883 Oracle Linux 8 os-prober bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-0883
description:
[1.74-11.0.1]
- Add patch os-prober-oracle.patch to add Oracle to the list of Linux distributions

[1.74-11]
- Bump release number
- Resolves: #RHEL-55234

[1.74-10]
- 90fallback: include possible kernel parameters from grub's default file
- common.sh: do not resolve symbolic link on mapped device filesystems
- Resolves: #RHEL-55234
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-0883

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-0883.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
os-prober-1.74-11.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
os-prober-1.74-11.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/os-prober-1.74-11.0.1.el8_10.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[1.74-11.0.1]
- Add patch os-prober-oracle.patch to add Oracle to the list of Linux distributions

[1.74-11]
- Bump release number
- Resolves: #RHEL-55234

[1.74-10]
- 90fallback: include possible kernel parameters from grub's default file
- common.sh: do not resolve symbolic link on mapped device filesystems
- Resolves: #RHEL-55234
